settings.title: A Year of Supporting Our Local Shelter
settings.excerpt: For every completed sale this year we have donated to a charity that helps people find a home of their own.
settings.body:
We spend our days helping people find homes, which is exactly why housing insecurity sits close to us. This year we decided to do something practical about it.

For every sale Keystoned completes in 2026, we donate to a local shelter that supports people without secure housing. So far that has added up to enough to fund several weeks of emergency beds.

Why this cause

It is hard to spend every day talking about homes and not notice the people who do not have one. The same town where we help families move is also where others are sleeping rough or moving between temporary rooms. Tying our giving to our own work felt like the honest thing to do, rather than a one-off cheque at the end of the year.

The shelter we support does the steady, unglamorous work that keeps people safe.

  • Emergency beds for people with nowhere else to go
  • Help finding a more settled place to live
  • Practical support for getting back on their feet

Every move adds up

It feels right that a business built around finding people homes helps those still looking for one. Thank you to every client whose move has quietly contributed to the cause.

Nobody who has bought or sold with us this year had to do anything extra, yet each completed sale has added a little more to the total. That is the part we like most. The ordinary work of helping one family move is quietly helping someone else find a roof too.
